apiVersion: No single global API version. JSON-RPC 2.0 for Solana RPC / DAS / Priority Fee methods; REST v0 for Enhanced Transactions and Webhooks (/v0/...); REST v1 for Wallet API (/v1/wallet/...). No formal versioning/deprecation policy page found; the 'Getting Data' guide flags the Enhanced Transactions API as legacy and recommends getTransactionsForAddress for new projects.

authentication.howPassed: Query parameter named `api-key` appended to the endpoint URL (e.g. https://mainnet.helius-rpc.com/?api-key=YOUR_API_KEY). The Wallet API additionally documents an `X-Api-Key` header as an alternative.
authentication.securityGuidance: Docs instruct: store keys in environment variables/secrets managers, never expose in client-side code or public repos, set up IP restrictions in the dashboard, use separate keys per environment, monitor usage in dashboard.

baseUrls.purpose: Solana mainnet RPC + DAS + Priority Fee (JSON-RPC POST) and Enhanced Transactions / Webhooks REST paths (/v0/...)
Solana devnet equivalent of the above
LaserStream gRPC regional hosts; documented regions: ewr, pitt, slc, lax, lon, ams, fra, tyo, sgp; devnet: laserstream-devnet-ewr.helius-rpc.com
'Secure RPC' per-account endpoint pattern shown in endpoints doc (account-specific hostnames); devnet pattern 123-xyz-fast-devnet.helius-rpc.com

endpoints.name: getAsset (DAS)
endpoints.freshness: Indexed near-real-time (last_indexed_slot returned); embedded price data explicitly cached with a 600-second cache ('may not be fresh')
endpoints.creditCost: 10 credits (DAS methods are 10 credits per request per DAS index page)

endpoints.name: getAssetBatch (DAS)
requiredParams: ids (array, up to 1,000 assets per request)
responseFields: array of asset objects (same shape as getAsset result)

endpoints.name: getAssetsByOwner (DAS)
responseFields: items[].token_info (symbol, balance, supply, decimals, token_program, associated_token_address, price_info { price_per_token, total_price, currency }) — token_info balance/price fields documented in the DAS Fungible Token Extension guide for owner-scoped queries with showFungible

nativeBalance (lamports, price_per_sol, total_price) when options.showNativeBalance=true — shape documented on the searchAssets reference; the getAssetsByOwner page documents the option but not the response field
endpoints.freshness: Indexed near-real-time; last_indexed_slot documents guaranteed-indexed slot

endpoints.name: searchAssets (DAS)
endpoints.freshness: Indexed near-real-time; SOL price fields subject to price caching

endpoints.name: getTokenAccounts (DAS)
responseFields: token_accounts[] (address, mint, owner, amount, delegated_amount, frozen, burnt)

endpoints.name: getSignaturesForAsset (DAS)
responseFields: transaction signature history for an asset including compressed NFTs

endpoints.name: getTransactionsForAddress (Helius-exclusive RPC extension)
optionalParams: filters.tokenTransfer (with, direction in|out|any, mint, amount ranges)
responseFields: signatures mode: signature, slot, transactionIndex, err, memo, blockTime, confirmationStatus, paginationToken; full mode: slot, transactionIndex, blockTime, transaction, meta, paginationToken
endpoints.pagination: Opaque paginationToken cursor; continue until token is null
endpoints.freshness: Real-time at confirmed/finalized commitment; mainnet retention documented as 'Unlimited', devnet 2 weeks, testnet unsupported
endpoints.creditCost: Signatures-only: 10 credits flat; full transactions: 10 credits per 100 returned (min 10); failed responses free

endpoints.name: getTransfersByAddress (Helius-exclusive RPC extension)
requiredParams: address (base58 owner wallet) — JSON-RPC params is a positional array: [address, config]
optionalParams: config.solMode (merged|separate; merged default — native SOL and WSOL merged, mint rewritten to So11111111111111111111111111111111111111111; separate keeps WSOL mint So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112)
responseFields: data[] (signature: string, slot: number, blockTime: number, type: string, fromUserAccount: string|null, toUserAccount: string|null, fromTokenAccount: string, toTokenAccount: string, mint: string, amount: STRING raw base-unit integer, decimals: number, uiAmount: STRING decimals-adjusted, feeAmount/feeUiAmount: strings only for Token-2022 transfer fees, confirmationStatus: string, transactionIdx/instructionIdx/innerInstructionIdx: numbers; token-account fields omitted for native SOL transfers)
endpoints.pagination: Cursor via paginationToken; no batch requests allowed
endpoints.freshness: Real-time at confirmed/finalized commitment; positioned in docs as 'reconciled transfer history' for balance reconciliation
endpoints.creditCost: 10 credits per request; requires Developer plan or higher

endpoints.name: getHealth (standard Solana RPC)
responseFields: result: "ok" when the node is healthy (JSON-RPC error otherwise)
endpoints.creditCost: 1 credit (Credits Per Method table) — cheapest documented probe for auth/connectivity checks

endpoints.name: Parse Transactions (Enhanced Transactions)
requiredParams: body: transactions[] (array of signatures, max 100 per request)
optionalParams: query: commitment (finalized|confirmed, default finalized; processed unsupported)
responseFields: array of EnhancedTransaction: description, type, source, fee, feePayer, signature, slot, timestamp, nativeTransfers[], tokenTransfers[], accountData[], transactionError, instructions[], events (nft, swap, compressed, ...)
endpoints.freshness: Parses confirmed/finalized transactions only; near-real-time after confirmation

endpoints.name: Get Parsed Transactions By Address (Enhanced Transactions)
responseFields: array of EnhancedTransaction objects (same shape as Parse Transactions)
endpoints.creditCost: 100 credits per parsing operation (billing docs); API flagged legacy — docs recommend getTransactionsForAddress for new projects

endpoints.name: getPriorityFeeEstimate (Priority Fee API)
requiredParams: transaction (base58/base64 serialized tx) OR accountKeys[] — at least one
responseFields: result.priorityFeeEstimate (microlamports) OR result.priorityFeeLevels (min, low, medium, high, veryHigh, unsafeMax)
endpoints.freshness: Real-time, based on recent blockchain activity over the configured lookback window

endpoints.name: Create Webhook (Webhooks API; CRUD also documented: GET list, GET by id, PUT update, PATCH toggle, DELETE)
endpoints.freshness: Push-based real-time event delivery (HTTP POST on matching Solana events)
endpoints.creditCost: 1 credit per delivered event; 100 credits per management operation (billing docs); 5-50 max webhooks per account depending on plan

endpoints.name: Get Wallet Balances (Wallet API — Beta)
requiredParams: api-key query param or X-Api-Key header
optionalParams: showNfts (default false; first page only, max 100)
responseFields: balances[] (mint, symbol, name, balance, decimals, pricePerToken, usdValue, logoUri, tokenProgram)
endpoints.freshness: Balances current; USD prices 'sourced from DAS and update hourly, covering the top 10,000 tokens by market cap' — 'estimates, not real-time market rates'
endpoints.creditCost: 100 credits per request; Beta — 'Endpoints and response formats may change'

endpoints.name: Get Wallet Transaction History (Wallet API — Beta)
responseFields: data[] (signature, timestamp, slot, fee, feePayer, error, balanceChanges[] {mint, amount, decimals})
endpoints.freshness: Near-real-time (timestamp may be null for very recent transactions)
endpoints.creditCost: 100 credits per request; Beta; token-account coverage documented as limited before slot 111,491,819

endpoints.name: Get Wallet Identity (Wallet API — Beta; plus batch-identity, balance-at, transfers, funded-by endpoints)
optionalParams: per endpoint; batch accepts up to 100 entries
responseFields: identity tags — docs cite database of 32,500+ tagged accounts and 3,000+ programs (exchanges, protocols, institutions)

assetClasses: Crypto only: Solana native SOL, SPL fungible tokens, Token-2022 assets, NFTs (Metaplex), compressed NFTs (cNFTs), ZK-compressed accounts
chains: Solana devnet (testnet explicitly unsupported for getTransactionsForAddress; FAQ mentions only mainnet+devnet)
coverage.marketsExchanges: Not a market-data provider. Enhanced Transactions parses on-chain activity from 70+ Solana programs (Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, Magic Eden, Tensor, Metaplex, Solend, Squads, etc.); parsing coverage varies by protocol.
coverage.geographies: Global service; LaserStream gRPC has 9 documented mainnet regions (US x4, Europe x3, Asia x2). ToS bars use by OFAC-sanctioned parties/regions.
notCovered: real-time token price feeds (prices provided are hourly estimates)

freshness.solanaRpc: Real-time node access with standard Solana commitment levels (processed/confirmed/finalized).
freshness.dasApi: Near-real-time indexed data; responses include last_indexed_slot ('all data up to and including this slot is guaranteed to have been indexed'). Embedded token price data cached ~600 seconds.
freshness.enhancedTransactions: Post-confirmation parsing; commitment finalized (default) or confirmed only — processed unsupported.
freshness.walletApi: Balances near-real-time; USD prices update hourly and cover only top 10,000 tokens by market cap; documented as estimates, not real-time market rates.
freshness.laserStream: Real-time gRPC/WebSocket streaming (accounts, transactions, blocks, slots) with configurable commitment; 24-hour historical replay (216,000 slots).

historicalDepth.getTransactionsForAddress: Mainnet: documented retention 'Unlimited' (full history); devnet: 2 weeks; testnet: unsupported. Token-account discovery before slot 111,491,819 requires documented workarounds (ownership metadata absent in earlier blocks); certain system-program addresses fall back to legacy archival/slot-scan with limited indexing.
historicalDepth.walletApiHistory: Token-account-related coverage documented as limited before slot 111,491,819 ('transactions involving token accounts active before this slot may be missing').
historicalDepth.standardRpc: 'Full Solana history through standard RPC, enhanced methods, and indexing guidance' per Getting Data guide; explicit archival retention windows not documented per method.

pagination.dasApi: Page-based (page starting at 1, limit up to 1000) and cursor-based (before/after; getTokenAccounts also has cursor field).
pagination.heliusRpcExtensions: Opaque paginationToken cursors (getTransactionsForAddress 'slot:position' format, limit up to 1000; getTransfersByAddress limit 1-100). getProgramAccountsV2 cursor supports 1-10,000 per request plus changedSinceSlot incremental sync.
pagination.walletApi: balances: page/limit + pagination.hasMore; history/transfers: cursor via pagination.nextCursor + before/after.

byPlan.Enterprise: Custom rate limits, volume discounts, SLA guarantees

specialLimits.laserStreamWsConnections: 5 (Free) to 1,000 (Professional) concurrent; 1,000 subscriptions per connection all tiers
specialLimits.webhooks: 5-50 max webhooks per account; 100,000 addresses per webhook
specialLimits.batchLimits: getTransaction: 100 items/request; getTransactionsForAddress & getTransfersByAddress: no batch requests; other historical methods: 10 items/request

creditCosts.historicalRpc10Credits: getBlock, getBlocks, getBlocksWithLimit, getBlockTime, getInflationReward, getProgramAccounts, getSignaturesForAddress, getTransaction, getTransfersByAddress

rateLimits.onExceed: HTTP 429. On credit exhaustion without autoscaling: '429 max usage reached'. Unused credits do not roll over.
rateLimits.backoffGuidance: Documented exponential backoff: wait ~1s before first retry, double each retry up to 30s max, add ±25% jitter, abandon after 5 attempts. Retryable: 408, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504, network errors. Non-retryable: 400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 422.

documentedStatusCodes.401: Authentication failure — check api-key query parameter
documentedStatusCodes.429: Rate limit exceeded or 'max usage reached' (credits exhausted) — upgrade plan, throttle, or enable autoscaling
documentedStatusCodes.500: Server error — check status page (helius.statuspage.io), contact support if persistent
documentedStatusCodes.503: Service unavailable — retry after brief delay
documentedStatusCodes.504: Gateway timeout — reduce request scope, use pagination, optimize query params

errors.errorSchema: Not formally documented in the error-codes FAQ; RPC/DAS methods follow JSON-RPC 2.0 request/response conventions (jsonrpc/id/result observed in reference pages) but a canonical error payload schema is not published.

businessPlus: LaserStream gRPC mainnet (Business & Professional; 10 connections at Business, 100 at Professional)
professionalOnly: Data add-ons (5 TB $400/mo to 100 TB $6,000/mo, overage 2 credits per 0.1 MB)

sdks.status: Officially maintained by Helius; v2.0.0 rewrite onto @solana/kit
sdks.covers: RPC, DAS, Enhanced Transactions, asset/ownership queries

sdks.language: Kotlin / PHP / Python / Rust (sync & async variants)
sdks.status: Community-maintained; docs state 'not officially maintained by our team — only the Node.js and Rust SDKs are'

licensing.storageCaching: Not explicitly addressed. ToS defines 'Included Responses' (HTTP/WebSocket node responses with 200 status) but publishes no explicit license terms governing storage or caching of retrieved data. Record as not documented.
licensing.redistribution: ToS Section 7(v) prohibits: 'sublicense, lease, sell, resell, rent, loan, distribute, transfer or otherwise allow the use of Helius Products ... for the benefit of third party.' Reselling/redistributing the service (and arguably its outputs as a service) is prohibited; redistribution rights for underlying public blockchain data are not separately addressed.
licensing.attribution: No attribution or display requirements documented.
licensing.dataAccuracy: ToS Section 12 disclaims: 'Helius disclaims any knowledge of, and does not guarantee: (a) the accuracy, reliability, or correctness of any data provided through helius.dev.' Services are 'as is' / 'as available'.
licensing.sla: No uptime commitment in standard ToS; SLA guarantees only via Enterprise plans. Termination: 'we reserve the right to terminate your account at any time and for any reason.'
licensing.sanctions: Use prohibited for OFAC-embargoed/blocked countries, organizations, persons.

limitations: Solana-only: no other chains, no traditional asset classes; unusable for multi-asset coverage beyond the Solana segment.

Not a market-data provider: token USD prices (Wallet API / DAS nativeBalance) update hourly, cover only the top 10,000 tokens by market cap, and are documented as 'estimates, not real-time market rates'; DAS getAsset price data has a 600-second cache. Must never be presented as real-time or execution-quality pricing.
Wallet API is in Beta: 'Endpoints and response formats may change' — schema stability risk for production pipelines.

Enhanced Transactions API is flagged as legacy in the Getting Data guide (getTransactionsForAddress recommended for new projects); parsing coverage varies by protocol and detailed decoding depends on Anchor IDL availability across the ~70+ supported programs.

Token-account-level history before slot 111,491,819 has documented gaps/workarounds (ownership metadata absent in early blocks) affecting getTransactionsForAddress token filters and Wallet API history completeness.
Enhanced/parsed endpoints do not support 'processed' commitment; lowest latency is 'confirmed'.
Incoming SPL transfers can be missed on address-history queries unless token-accounts / filters.tokenAccounts is set to balanceChanged or all (ATA vs wallet pubkey caveat).
Devnet retention for getTransactionsForAddress is only 2 weeks; testnet unsupported.
Credits do not roll over; exhaustion without autoscaling returns '429 max usage reached', halting data flows mid-cycle.
No SLA on self-serve plans; ToS allows termination at any time and disclaims data accuracy — institutional dependence requires an Enterprise contract for SLA and support guarantees.
LaserStream historical replay is limited to 24 hours (216,000 slots) — not a backfill mechanism.
No formal published versioning/deprecation policy; error response schema not formally documented.
DAS indexing lag must be handled via last_indexed_slot; no hard freshness SLO documented.

primaryFor: Solana on-chain holdings and portfolio composition (DAS getAssetsByOwner/searchAssets/getTokenAccounts; Wallet API balances)
Full-history Solana transaction and transfer research/backfill (getTransactionsForAddress with unlimited mainnet retention, getTransfersByAddress reconciled transfers)
Counterparty/entity analysis on Solana (Wallet API identity with 32,500+ tagged accounts, funded-by provenance)
Real-time Solana event monitoring and alerting (webhooks; LaserStream gRPC/WSS on Business+ plans)
NFT/cNFT and Token-2022 metadata and ownership (DAS is the reference implementation for the Digital Asset Standard)
Solana transaction cost analytics (Priority Fee API)
fallbackFor: Human-readable transaction classification (Enhanced Transactions — legacy-flagged, parsing coverage varies; prefer getTransactionsForAddress + in-house enrichment)
Indicative USD valuations of Solana tokens (hourly, top-10k only — acceptable only as a fallback/estimate layer behind a dedicated market-data provider)
notSuitableFor: Real-time or historical market pricing/quotes (any asset class)
Any non-Solana chain or traditional securities data
Redistribution/resale of the service to third parties (ToS-prohibited)
hardConstraints: Hourly price estimates must never be presented as real-time market data; label as indicative with timestamp.
Wallet API beta schemas require contract tests and change monitoring before production use.
Pre-slot-111,491,819 token-account gaps must be disclosed in any completeness-sensitive research output.
Institutional deployment should be on Business/Professional minimum (rate limits, LaserStream mainnet) and Enterprise for SLA; budget credits: DAS=10, Enhanced=100, Wallet=100 per call.
Respect documented backoff (1s doubling to 30s, ±25% jitter, 5 attempts) and non-retryable code handling in all adapters.

sourcesConsulted.whatItVerified: Official docs root/index; complete map of documentation sections, SDK repos, status page, billing and API-reference URLs
API categories (RPC HTTP/WebSocket, DAS, Priority Fee, Enhanced Transactions, ZK Compression, LaserStream, Webhooks) and reference navigation
api-key query-parameter authentication mechanism and security guidance
Base URLs: mainnet/devnet/beta helius-rpc.com HTTP + WSS, secure per-account endpoints, deprecated staked host
Billing docs index; plan tiers, credit allocations, headline rate limits
Plan pricing ($0/$49/$499/$999), credits, per-plan feature gating (LaserStream gRPC, Pre-Confirmations, data add-ons), support levels, Enterprise SLA
Per-plan RPC and DAS/Enhanced rate limits, special method limits, batch limits, 429 behavior, exponential backoff guidance, retryable vs non-retryable codes
Credit costs per API family (RPC 1, DAS 10, Enhanced 100, Wallet 100, streaming 2/0.1MB, webhooks 1/event, ZK 10/100)
Documented status codes 401/429/500/503/504 and remediation guidance; absence of formal error schema
Solana-only network support, credits do not roll over, '429 max usage reached' on exhaustion, autoscaling/prepaid credits
Complete DAS method list (12 methods), JSON-RPC 2.0 transport, 10-credit cost, getAssetBatch 1,000-asset cap
getAsset params, options, response fields, 600-second price cache caveat
searchAssets filters, tokenType values, hybrid pagination, response shape incl. nativeBalance
getAssetsByOwner params, 1000/page max, display options, last_indexed_slot semantics
getTokenAccounts params, cursor pagination, token_accounts response fields

Full standard RPC method list with credit tiers; Helius-exclusive extensions (getTransactionsForAddress, getTransfersByAddress, getProgramAccountsV2, getTokenAccountsByOwnerV2); re-verified 2026-07-17: getHealth listed at 1 credit; getTransactionsForAddress and getTransfersByAddress both flagged Developer plan+

Verified 2026-07-17 for adapter build: token_info subfields for owner-scoped fungible queries (symbol, balance, supply, decimals, token_program, associated_token_address) and price_info subfields (price_per_token, total_price, currency) with worked JitoSOL example; supported on getAssetsByOwner and searchAssets
getTransactionsForAddress full spec: params/filters, paginationToken, credit metering, unlimited mainnet retention, devnet 2 weeks, slot 111,491,819 caveat

getTransfersByAddress spec: config params, response fields, 10 credits, Developer+ requirement; re-verified 2026-07-17: params is positional [address, config]; amount and uiAmount are strings (raw base units / decimals-adjusted); solMode merged rewrites native SOL + WSOL mint to So11111111111111111111111111111111111111111; token-account fields omitted for native SOL rows
Enhanced Transactions endpoint inventory: POST /v0/transactions, GET /v0/addresses/{address}/transactions
EnhancedTransaction response fields and endpoint purposes
Parse Transactions: 100-signature batch max, commitment restrictions, 70+ parsed programs, response schema
By-address endpoint: query params, signature-cursor pagination, ATA caveat
getPriorityFeeEstimate params (priorityLevel, lookbackSlots 1-150), response fields
Webhooks CRUD endpoints (POST/GET/PUT/PATCH/DELETE /v0/webhooks)
Create Webhook body params, webhookType values, 100k address limit, response fields
Wallet API endpoint inventory, api.helius.xyz base URL, X-Api-Key header option, 100-credit cost, identity database size, Beta status
Balances endpoint params/response, hourly top-10k USD pricing, 'estimates not real-time' language
History endpoint cursor pagination, response schema, slot 111,491,819 coverage note, 100 credits
LaserStream 9 regional mainnet hostnames, 24h/216,000-slot replay, plan gating, 2 credits per 0.1MB
Data-access decision guidance, 'full Solana history' claim, Enhanced Transactions flagged legacy
Official SDKs (Node.js helius-sdk, Rust helius) vs community SDKs (not officially maintained)
ToS: no-resale/sublicense clause 7(v), Included Responses definition, accuracy disclaimer (Section 12), no SLA, termination-at-will, OFAC sanctions restrictions

openQuestions: Exact archival retention windows for standard RPC historical methods (getBlock/getTransaction/getSignaturesForAddress) are not documented per method — 'full Solana history' is claimed only in the Getting Data guide.

No published license terms explicitly govern storage, caching, or downstream display of API response data ('Included Responses' is defined but its usage rights are not) — Enterprise agreement should clarify before redistributing derived datasets.
Canonical machine-readable error response schema (JSON-RPC error object fields, REST error bodies) is not formally documented.
Formal deprecation/versioning policy and advance-notice commitments are not published; Enhanced Transactions is flagged legacy without a sunset date.
Webhook delivery guarantees (retry semantics, ordering, at-least-once vs best-effort) are not covered in the pages reviewed.
Credit cost of getPriorityFeeEstimate and per-DAS-method exceptions are stated only at category level (Priority Fee 1 credit, DAS 10 credits) — per-endpoint pages omit costs.
Whether Wallet API rate limits and Beta status carry contractual protections at Enterprise tier is not documented publicly.
